nasb.text: And the chief priests and the leading men of the Jews brought charges against Paul, and they were urging him,

esv.text: And the chief priests and the principal men of the Jews laid out their case against Paul, and they urged him,

cnv.text: 祭司長和猶太人的首領，到他面前控告保羅。他們又要求非斯都，

ccb.text: 祭司长和犹太人的首领向他控告保罗，

csbs.text: 祭司长们和犹太人的首领们向菲斯特斯指控保罗，并且恳求菲斯特斯，
